text:
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary indicating a pressing GitHub workflow failure for Jeeves.

- [reply needed] "Rob Collins & Esther Wakeman": Rob Collins and Esther Wakeman express desire to meet with Michael and Piper while in Bremerton.
- [reply needed] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley is sharing an annotated version of Sam Keen's essay with the Loder Group.
- [decision required] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary highlighting a decision required from Carnival Cruise Line regarding Rewards Terms.
- [follow up] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch continues a philosophical discussion thread about Descartes.
- [follow up] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shared unfinished notes and responses to a chapter on time.
- [follow up] Michael Lang: Michael Lang sent himself notes or a draft related to McGilchrist Chapter 22 on time.
- [follow up] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary noting pressing GitHub workflow failures in jeeves-unchained and jeeves-memory repositories.
- [no action] "Anthropic, PBC": Receipt from Anthropic for a purchase.
